listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Grapnel-Hand Arm
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Grapnel-Hand Arm replaces the user's arm from the elbow down with a bronze-plated prosthesis containing tension gears, recoil springs, a coiled retrieval cable and a fully articulated launchable hand.

Range 30 feet
Weight Limit up to 3 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +1 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 10 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 3 Bulk.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Greater Grapnel-Hand Arm
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Grapnel-Hand Arm replaces the user's arm from the elbow down with a bronze-plated prosthesis containing tension gears, recoil springs, a coiled retrieval cable and a fully articulated launchable hand.

Range 50 feet
Weight Limit up to 8 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +3 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 20 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 8 Bulk.
Pull Creature: on a successful Grapple, pull the creature 10 feet toward you.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 12 Bulk.
Pull Creature: on a successful Grapple, pull the creature 15 feet toward you.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

listCustomFeats.name: Launch hand
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
You fire the hand at a target point within range. Attempt an Athletics check with a +1 item bonus.

• Object/Surface: On success, the hand clamps securely.
• Creature: Attempt an Athletics check to Grapple the creature at range.
This activation does not cause Strain.

listCustomFeats.name: Reel In
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Choose one:
• Pull Yourself: You move up to 10 feet toward the anchored hand without triggering reactions.
• Pull Object: Pull an unattended object of up to 3 Bulk into your hand.
• Pull Creature: Not available at this tier.

listCustomFeats.name: Emergency Catch
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.
Effect: You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point.
You prevent the fall as if you had successfully Grabbed an Edge.
Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.
